kirundi.mix_paints_with_subtractive_color_theo: Vanga amarangi ukoresheje inyigisho y'amabara yo gukuramwo
kirundi.color_theory_additive_vs_subtractive_m: Inyigisho y'amabara (kuvanga vyongera na vyo gukuramwo, amabara yuzuzanya, HSL/RGB), imirongo igoramye y'imibare (hypotrochoids, Lissajous), fractals no kwisusa, jewometeri y'amakaro, ukwumva kw'amaso muri Op Art, amahame yo kugerwako ya WCAG, n'ubuhanzi bwa mudasobwa. Buri gikoresho cigisha imibare iri inyuma y'ubwiza.
kirundi.hue_0_360_around_the_wheel_saturation_: Hue (0-360 hakurikijwe uruziga), saturation (isuku), urumuri. Ayuzuzanya arahanganye, ay'urumuri rumwe ari hafi, atatu ari ku ntera ya 120°. Newton yashize amabara yose ku ruziga mu 1666.
kirundi.paint_and_print_subtractive_cmy_mixes_: Amarangi no gucapa = gukuramwo (CMY iyavanze itanga umwijima); urumuri n'ecran = kongeramwo (RGB iyavanze itanga umweru). Isi imwe, mugabo imibare itandukanye rwose — imashini icapa yiyumvira ku mbaho za K, televiziyo ikatekereza kuri Hz.
kirundi.each_pixel_is_a_deliberate_decision_ne: Buri pixel ni icemezo cafashwe ku bushake. Sprites za NES zizwiho gushira intwari muri 16×16 hakoreshejwe amabara ane gusa. Algorithm y'umurongo ya Bresenham ishushanya imirongo iruhande nta mibare y'ibice.
kirundi.sol_lewitt_wrote_instructions_the_wall: Sol LeWitt yanditse amabwiriza; uwakoze ku rukuta ni we washize mu bikorwa. Uyu munsi: Processing, p5.js, Cinder. “Umuhanzi ni itegeko, si inyishu.”
kirundi.connect_every_n_th_nail_an_envelope_cu: Huza buri musumari wa n; umurongo w'ibahasha uzagaragara. Mary Everest Boole yabimenyekanishije nk'imibare yo mu ishure hafi y'umwaka wa 1900. Cardioid yakozwe n'imirongo igororotse iracashimisha.
kirundi.every_periodic_2d_tiling_fits_one_of_1: Buri gishushanyo c'amakaro ca 2D cisubiramo kija mu rimwe mu matsinda 17 y'ubunganya. Escher yabimenye ubwo yasuraga Alhambra mu 1936; hanyuma amara imyaka 30 arangiza urutonde rwose.
kirundi.mandelbrot_1975_cauliflower_coastlines: Mandelbrot 1975. Shufureri, inkombe z'inyanja, imitsi y'amaraso, inkuba, uduseke tw'umwuka mu bihaha — vyose ni fractal. “Ibicu si imipira, imisozi si za konu, kandi ibishishwa vy'ibiti ntivyoroshe.”
kirundi.css_gives_you_linear_radial_and_conic_: CSS iguha gradient y'umurongo, iy'uruziga, n'iya conic. Umukororomvya nyawo ufite amabara abandanya (nta mirongo itandukanye) — “amabara 7 y'umukororomvya” yari ugutoranya kwa Newton ku bw'impamvu z'umuziki.
kirundi.mandala_art_rose_windows_in_cathedrals: Ubuhanzi bwa mandala, amadirisha y'amaroza mu makatedarali.
kirundi.adjust_base_hue_saturation_lightness_v: Hindura hue fatizo, saturation, itandukaniro ry'urumuri, kuzenguruka, n'ingano y'amabara. Igikoresho kigaragaza amabara yumvikana ako kanya kandi kikayashira mu bwoko bumwe mu bwumvikane 5 butandukanye. Nta manota, nta nyishu kigaragazwa — bandanya uhindure kandi witegereze ni ibihe bivange bitanga ubuhe bwumvikane.
kirundi.i_think_i_understand_color_harmony_now: Ndiyumvira ko ubu numvise ubwumvikane bw'amabara — reka mbisigure mu magambo yanje
kirundi.explain_in_your_own_words_how_do_hue_s: Sigura mu magambo yawe: ni gute intera ya hue, saturation, n'ingano y'amabara bigena "ubwumvikane"?
kirundi.greatest_common_divisor_of_the_two_rad: (umugabanyi rusange munini) w'imirongo yombi. Iyo R/r ari igice coroshe, ubona ibibabi bike; ibipimo bigoye bitanga inzira zizunguruka zitigera zisubirwamo.
kirundi.occur_when_highly_saturated_complement: abaho iyo amabara yuzuzanya afite saturation nyinshi ashizwe ku ruhande rumwe. Utugingo twa kuraba amabara mu jisho ryawe turahatana, bigatanga impera ivuza kandi idahagaze neza — ibi vyitwa
kirundi.or_tiling_covers_a_plane_with_shapes_t: (canke gushira amakaro) gutwikira ubuso hakoreshejwe amashusho ahuye nta myanya canke kwuzuranaho. Ni amashusho asanzwe atatu gusa ashobora gutwikira ubuso ari yonyine:
kirundi.1898_1972_transformed_simple_tilings_i: (1898–1972) yahinduye amakaro yoroshe abugira ubuhanzi agoreka impera z'amakaro. Uburyo bwe: goreka uruhande rumwe rw'ishusho hanyuma ukoporore uko kugoreka ku ruhande ruhanganye, kugira ngo amakaro abandanye guhuza neza. Iri ni ryo shingiro rya
kirundi.flip_every_tessellation_can_be_classif: (guhindura uruhande). Buri gishushanyo c'amakaro gishobora gushirwa mu ciciro hakurikijwe iryo kijamwo mu 'matsinda 17 y'ibishushanyo vy'urukuta'.
kirundi.is_generated_by_iterating_z_z_c_for_ev: ritangwa no gusubiramwo z = z² + c kuri buri kadomo c mu buso bw'imibare igoye. Ududomo aho |z| iguma mu mipaka (itarenza 2) turi 'imbere' mu itsinda. Umupaka waryo ugaragaza
kirundi.use_the_same_formula_but_fix_c_and_var: akoresha formule imwe mugabo abandanya c kandi agahindura z y'intanguriro. Buri kadomo ka Mandelbrot gatanga itsinda rya Julia ryihariye — ududomo turi imbere muri Mandelbrot dutanga Julia zihujwe; udutuye hanze dutanga 'amatsinda ya Fatou' asa n'umukungugu.
kirundi.fractal_modifies_the_iteration_to_z_re: ihindura isubiramwo rikaba z = (|Re(z)| + i|Im(z)|)² + c, bigatanga ishusho itaringaniye isa n'ubwato buriho umuriro. Yavumbuwe na Michael Michelitsch na Otto Rössler mu 1992.
kirundi.use_gradients_to_create_depth_direct_a: bakoresha gradient kugira ngo batange ubwimbike, bayobore ubwenge, kandi bakangure amarangamutima. Gradient iva ku bishushe ija ku bikonje yerekana ubwimbike (kuraba kw'ikirere); iva ku rumuri ija ku mwijima yerekana ubunini (chiaroscuro).
kirundi.describe_an_object_for_a_depth_map_or_: Sigura ikintu ku ikarita y'ubwimbike canke ubuso ku gishushanyo...
kirundi.where_it_s_far_the_period_is_longer_yo: ; aho kiri 'kure', igihe kiba kirekire. Ubwonko bwawe busigura itandukaniro ry'ivyo bihe nk'ubwimbike.
kirundi.animates_the_depth_map_from_the_static: Igenza ikarita y'ubwimbike ivuye ku gafishi Guhagarara ikoresheje ingaruka y'impinduka watoranyije. Banza uje mu buryo bwa Guhagarara kugira ngo ushushanye ikarita yawe y'ubwimbike.
kirundi.describe_a_3d_scene_and_ai_will_genera: Sigura ahantu ha 3D naho AI izatanga ikarita y'ubwimbike, hanyuma iyigenze n'impinduka.
kirundi.lock_your_eyes_into_the_3d_view_before: Shira amaso yawe mu kuraba kwa 3D mbere yo gufyonda Kina
kirundi.slower_speeds_4_6_fps_are_easier_to_ma: Umuvuduko muke (4–6 FPS) woroshe mu kubungabunga ubwitonzi
kirundi.pulse_and_heart_presets_are_the_easies: Ivyagenwe mbere vya Gutera n'Umutima ni vyo vyoroshe kubona bigenda
